note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for what generated creative is allowed to depict. Generated media must show THIS product — never a random/generic supplement, stock bottle, pills/gummies (this is a powder product) or competitor packaging. Update `approved_reference_assets` as real pack shots land on the website; keep `approved_for_generation` accurate. Doses/prices always come from data/config/product-facts.json — never from this file.

visual_spec.packaging_type: premium matte stand-up supplement pouch (300g) with a black label block
visual_spec.closure: resealable zip seal with a 14g scoop inside
visual_spec.logo_usage: HerBody wordmark with the ✦ spark exactly as supplied — never redrawn, restyled or approximated by the model
visual_spec.product_form: fine powder, one 14g scoop per serving, mixed into 200ml cold water or a shaker
visual_spec.product_colour: pale pink powder; prepared drink is a soft strawberry-lemonade pink
visual_spec.serving_visual_rules: Scoop from pouch into glass or shaker, shake 10 seconds, calm morning-light framing. Never medical settings, never body-transformation framing, never pills/capsules/gummies standing in for the powder, never an AI-invented ingredient panel — real label artwork is composited before publishing.

reference_asset_contract.note: Each entry: { id, url, role (hero|label|lifestyle|powder-macro|drink), angle, background_notes, approved_for_generation: true|false, last_reviewed: YYYY-MM-DD }. Only entries with approved_for_generation:true are ever passed to generation providers.
allowed_sources: founder-supplied media URLs added to approved_reference_assets

forbidden_visual_substitutes: pills, capsules or gummies (this is a powder)
generic protein tubs standing in for the pouch

tiktok_shop.note: TikTok Shop UK listing requires category approval + document checks (see marketing/TIKTOK_GROWTH_PACK.md §4). Until approved:true, all paid/organic traffic routes to the DTC website PDP.
